panels.title: API — videos created (1h)
panels.description: New video records accepted by scrape.exchange (HTTP 201)

panels.title: API — videos uploaded (1h)
panels.description: Existing video records refreshed on scrape.exchange (HTTP 200)

panels.title: API — channels created (1h)
panels.description: New channel records accepted by scrape.exchange (HTTP 201)

panels.title: API — channels updated (1h)
panels.description: Existing channel records refreshed on scrape.exchange (HTTP 200)

panels.title: Channels scraped & RSS feeds downloaded (per second)
Video scrape failures by reason
panels.description: Requires the reason label introduced by yt_video_scrape.py. Reasons: rate_limit, unavailable, premiere, transient, missing_data, other.

panels.title: scrape.exchange request latency p50 / p95 / p99
scrape.exchange request rate by status class
YouTube request latency p50 / p95 / p99 (all kinds)
YouTube p95 latency by kind (http vs innertube)
YouTube request rate by kind + status class
yt-dlp scrape duration p50 / p95 / p99
yt-dlp extract_info active (thread-pool occupancy)
panels.description: Number of yt-dlp extract_info() calls currently running inside the default ThreadPoolExecutor. If this gauge sits pinned at the executor size while videos_scraped_total rate is low, the bottleneck is the executor or the GIL — not the rate limiter or YouTube. Split per job (process) so the subprocess pool fanout is visible.

panels.title: RSS: seconds since channel last processed
panels.description: Freshness gauge per-channel; large spikes indicate worker starvation or rate limiting.

panels.title: RSS queue size by tier
panels.description: Number of channels in each priority tier queue. Tier 1 = highest priority (most subscribers).

panels.title: RSS tier SLA (on-time vs overdue)
panels.description: Rate of channels processed within (on-time) vs after (overdue) the tier's target interval. SLA% = on_time / (on_time + overdue).

targets.expr: sum by (tier) (rate(yt_rss_tier_on_time_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[15m])) / (sum by (tier) (rate(yt_rss_tier_on_time_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[15m])) + (sum by (tier) (rate(yt_rss_tier_overdue_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[15m])) or vector(0)))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, call_type) (rate(rate_limiter_sleep_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[5m]))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Videos scraped per second by proxy
Video watcher — files detected / skipped / enqueued
panels.description: Upload-only watcher KPIs for the video scraper. detected − skipped should equal enqueued.

panels.title: Channel watcher — files detected / skipped / enqueued
panels.description: Upload-only watcher KPIs for the channel scraper. detected − skipped should equal enqueued.

panels.title: Watcher totals (since start)
panels.description: Cumulative counts since the upload-only watcher started.
